name: The Fortunate Doomed
specialty: A skilled and ruthless fire-based combat team, known for their strategic use of pyrotechnics and unyielding resolve in the heat of battle

members.name: Lysander Ashwind
members.note: A man with a scarred face, he lost his family in a rift explosion and seeks to prevent others from suffering the same fate

members.name: Sylphia Blazeheart
members.note: Her fur is singed from countless battles, and she has a habit of leaving a trail of burned paper scraps as a warning to those who cross her

members.name: Thorgrim Ironfire
members.note: He lost his hand in a rift explosion, replaced with a mechanical one, and carries a heavy grudge against the rifts that took his limb

members.name: Zara Flamewing
members.note: She wears a mask to hide her identity, and has a tense relationship with the other Wardens due to her past as a rift-runner

visual: They wear leather armor dyed red, with hoods that cover their faces when in public. Each member carries a flintlock pistol and a flame-tipped spear, and they move with a fierce, disciplined grace
reputation_note: The Fortunate Doomed are feared and respected by both citizens and criminals alike. Their reputation for ruthless efficiency in combat and unyielding loyalty to the Wardens of Ash makes them a force to be reckoned with in the Undercity
